    static class Foo_C_Method_P0_int_P1_int 
    {
        // [Expressive]
        // public int Method(int x, int y) => x + y;
        static global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<global::System.Func<global::Foo.C, int, int, int>> Expression() 
        {
            var p__this = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(global::Foo.C), "@this");
            var p_x = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(int), "x");
            var p_y = global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Parameter(typeof(int), "y");

            return global::System.Linq.Expressions.Expression.Lambda<global::System.Func<global::Foo.C, int, int, int>>(expr_0, p__this, p_x, p_y);
